ddls:
CREATE TABLE "realms" (
  "realm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each realm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the realm */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the realm is located */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of realm */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population level of the realm */,
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the timezone of the realm */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the realm */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the realm was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the realm (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the realm's information was updated */,
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrator responsible for the realm */,
  "average_player_level" INTEGER /* Average level of players in the realm */,
  "event_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of events held in the realm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("realm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realms_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realms_timezone_id FOREIGN KEY ("timezone_id") REFERENCES timezones ("timezone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realms_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realms_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES realm_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realms_administrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("administrator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realms_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the region was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the region (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the region's information was updated */,
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrator responsible for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_administrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("administrator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realm_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each realm type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the realm type (PvP or PvE) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the realm type */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the realm type was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the realm type (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the realm type's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population level */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population level (e.g., New Players, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population level */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the population level was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the population level (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the population level's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timezones" (
  "timezone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timezone */,
  "timezone_name" TEXT /* Name of the timezone (e.g., CST, PST) */,
  "offset" TEXT /* Offset from UTC */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the timezone was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the timezone (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the timezone's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timezone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., United States) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the location (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the location's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user's information was updated */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "realm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the realm where the event is taking place */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the event was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the event's information was updated */,
  "administrator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the administrator who created the event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_realm_id FOREIGN KEY ("realm_id") REFERENCES realms ("realm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_administrator_id FOREIGN KEY ("administrator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, moderator, player) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the role (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the role's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., New Player Event, Community Event) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the event type was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event type (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the event type's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
